summary: Iteration 40: Widget PDF Popup and Article Editor Expiry Date Dropdowns - All features working correctly. Both fixes verified: 1) Widget PDF popup shows html_content in styled cnx-doc-viewer when file doesn't exist, 2) Article expiry date uses three dropdowns (Tag/Monat/Jahr) with German months.
critical_code_review_comments: Widget embed.js correctly implements html_content fallback with cnx-doc-viewer styling (lines 202-210)
ArticleEditor.jsx properly implements three Select dropdowns for expiry date with German month names (lines 910-1000)
All data-testid attributes are correctly placed for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes verified working: 1) Widget PDF popup uses html_content fallback in cnx-doc-viewer when physical file doesn't exist (kaufvertrag_T4.pdf test case), 2) Article expiry date replaced calendar picker with three dropdowns (Tag/Monat/Jahr) with all 12 German months and clear button functionality.
